title: Charred Crisp Energizing Uruguayan Minari Agemono-Deep-Fry
description: This Uruguayan dish features charred, crisp-edged Minari wrapped in an Agemono-deep-fry. Perfect for a quick, energizing snack or meal.
instructions: Heat 1/2 cup of tallow or avocado oil in a wok over medium-high heat (375°F).
Separate the Minari into individual leaves.
Season the Minari with salt and black pepper.
Add 4-6 Minari leaves to the oil and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until charred and crispy.
Repeat the cooking process with the remaining Minari leaves.
Increase the heat to high and add the garlic to the oil for 30 seconds, or until fragrant.
Drain the Minari on paper towels and serve hot with lime wedges.
Serve immediately, garnished with lime wedges if desired.
